subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the herald of the Covenant and the diffuser of the divine fragrances across the horizons, rejoice in the grace of thy Lord who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنادی بالمیثاق و الناشر لنفحات الله فی الافاق استبشر بفضل ربک الذی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of love
